'''ân-r-m-f''' ('''kanarmefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jestermaxx|jestermaxx]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jestermaxx|jestermaxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-r-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kanarmefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinarmefoko|thinarmefoko]] || [[word:jinarmefoko|jinarmefoko]] || [[word:shinarmefoko|shinarmefoko]] || [[word:kinarmefoko|kinarmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunarmefoko|thuthunarmefoko]] || [[word:jujunarmefoko|jujunarmefoko]] || [[word:shushunarmefoko|shushunarmefoko]] || [[word:kukunarmefoko|kukunarmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunarmefoko|thunarmefoko]] || [[word:junarmefoko|junarmefoko]] || [[word:shunarmefoko|shunarmefoko]] || [[word:kunarmefoko|kunarmefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonarmefoko|thonarmefoko]] || [[word:jonarmefoko|jonarmefoko]] || [[word:shonarmefoko|shonarmefoko]] || [[word:konarmefoko|konarmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonarmefoko|thonarmefoko]] || [[word:jonarmefoko|jonarmefoko]] || [[word:shonarmefoko|shonarmefoko]] || [[word:konarmefoko|konarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnarmefoko|thĂŠnarmefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnarmefoko|jĂŠnarmefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnarmefoko|shĂŠnarmefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnarmefoko|kĂŠnarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanarmefoko|thathanarmefoko]] || [[word:jajanarmefoko|jajanarmefoko]] || [[word:shashanarmefoko|shashanarmefoko]] || [[word:kakanarmefoko|kakanarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanarmefoko|thanarmefoko]] || [[word:janarmefoko|janarmefoko]] || [[word:shanarmefoko|shanarmefoko]] || [[word:kanarmefoko|kanarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanarmefoko|thanarmefoko]] || [[word:janarmefoko|janarmefoko]] || [[word:shanarmefoko|shanarmefoko]] || [[word:kanarmefoko|kanarmefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
